description: Product scope, Web/CLI boundary, and rollout guardrails for the Ink-based Pibo CLI Session UI.

userStories.title: Finalize CLI Session UI V1 scope decisions
userStories.description: As an engineering lead, I want V1 scope decisions captured in docs so that implementation stories do not expand into Web-only product areas.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the Ink CLI Session UI change docs or PRD README with final command-name decision or an explicit TBD marker
Document that Web Chat remains the primary full-featured control center
Document that CLI V1 excludes Projects, Workflows, Cron, Ralph, Agent Designer, full Settings, and full context management
Document whether /model, /thinking, /fork, and /details are V1 or later
userStories.notes: Documentation/contract story; run before code implementation.

userStories.title: Add CLI Session UI capability documentation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a durable capability spec for the CLI Session UI so that the product contract is discoverable outside the change folder.
acceptanceCriteria: Document CLI purpose: SSH, bootstrap, recovery, and fast local session work
Document required reuse of shared trace/session view models and Ink-native rendering
Document Web-only non-goals and the V1 Slash Command list

userStories.title: Add Web and CLI boundary checklist
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a checklist that prevents accidental Web feature porting or Web UI regressions while implementing the CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a checklist to the PRD README, tasks, or design docs covering Web UI unchanged, no DOM imports in Ink renderer, no CLI-only trace mapper, bounded output, and Web-only feature exclusions
Checklist mentions that existing pibo tui and pibo tui:routed must keep working unless a separate migration is approved
Checklist includes root and Chat Web typecheck/build validation expectations
